name: United Catholics
description_short: Catholics United Credit Union is a financial cooperative based in South Hutchinson, Kansas, offering savings accounts, money market accounts, and share certificates to members.
description_long:
Catholics United Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution located at 612 S Maple St in South Hutchinson, Kansas 67505. The credit union operates as a cooperative financial service provider serving its membership base through traditional deposit and lending products. The institution is regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) and maintains comprehensive financial reporting through regulatory filings that are publicly available and tracked by third-party rating services.

The credit union offers a range of deposit products including savings accounts, money market accounts, and share certificates (CDs) with various maturity terms. According to MonitorBankRates data from April 2026, their products include 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month share certificates, along with standard savings and money market deposit options. The institution also appears to offer mortgage lending services, with 30-year fixed-rate mortgages mentioned in comparative rate discussions.

Catholics United Credit Union distinguishes itself through its A+ Overall Health Grade and 5.0 star rating from MonitorBankRates, indicating exceptional financial stability based on NCUA regulatory data. The institution achieved a perfect score of 100/100 on the Overall Health & Safety Grade scale. This rating reflects the credit union's strong capitalization and operational performance as measured through industry-standard metrics including the Texas Ratio and financial stability indicators.

Prospective members should note that current rate information was not fully displayed on the MonitorBankRates page at the time of review, with the notation that rates are constantly being updated. As a credit union, membership eligibility may be restricted to specific groups or geographic areas. The institution's small size relative to major banks means it may have more limited service offerings or technology platforms compared to larger financial institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

diagnosis: Catholics United Credit Union is best for members eligible to join this regional Kansas-based credit union who seek basic deposit and mortgage products backed by exceptional financial stability ratings. The main caveat is that current rate information is limited on third-party sites, requiring direct contact with the institution, and membership eligibility may be restricted to specific groups or geographic regions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
